source.authorization: Ael explicitly authorized this public deposit in Warpkeep-Assets.
source.privateWorkflowMetadata: intentionally omitted from the public archive

designation.name: Hegemony Frontier Keep and Main Castle 3D source set
designation.status: descriptive archive label; no stricter canonical game name asserted
designation.role: supplemental editable and runtime-reference castle/keep models

license.scope: Publication and distribution of this named 3D package and archive metadata are authorized as part of Warpkeep-Assets. No additional open-license, trademark, or canonical-identity right is asserted.

sanitization.blend: The main Blend and supplied .blend1 backup were published as Blender 5.2 path-sanitized derivatives because serialized Blender UI state contained an absolute local file-browser path.
sanitization.scope: Only the stored UI file-browser directory was rewritten to //source-history/. Scene, object, topology, materials, packed images, bounds, and render identity were preserved.
sanitization.originals: Supplied originals are retained privately and were not uploaded byte-for-byte.
sanitization.publicRawMarkerScan: Decompressed public derivatives contain zero user-home paths, Hermes cache markers, Discord, Telegram, or CDN markers.

validation.visualQa: Front/side local renders showed coherent textured Frontier Keep and Main Castle models without gross clipping, missing core geometry, or corruption.

correspondence.frontierKeepBlendGlb: Same one-mesh structure, 55,704 vertices, 56,466 triangles, four packed/embedded images, and matching bounds.
correspondence.blendBackup: The .blend1 backup is byte-distinct but matches the main Blend on scene, object, mesh, material, packed-image, bounds, and topology records.
correspondence.mainCastle: Separate larger one-mesh model with 173,299 vertices, 73,070 triangles, and two embedded WebP atlases; node metadata identifies the Hegemony hero castle asset.

verification.releaseSidecar: SHA256SUMS.txt includes the attachment and correctly hashed manifest.json.
verification.repositoryVerifier: scripts/verify_release.py validates .blend and .blend1 Zstandard containers with exact compressed/decompressed sizes and actual Blender headers.
